executives.name: Scott McGregor
executives.background: Scott McGregor was President and CEO of Broadcom Corporation from 2005 to 2016. He also served as President and CEO of the Philips Semiconductors division of Royal Philips Electronics.

board_of_directors.background: Scott McGregor was President and CEO of Broadcom Corporation from 2005 to 2016. He also served as President and CEO of the Philips Semiconductors division of Royal Philips Electronics.
